response.original_title: FlowTracker Handheld ADV: Instructional Training Video
response.overview: Join SonTek Senior Applications Specialist, John Sloat, as he walks you through some of the steps you will need to take before making your first discharge measurement with the FlowTracker Handheld ADV® (Acoustic Doppler Velocimeter). Learn how to conduct FlowTracker pre-deployment tests, how to select a measurement site, best measurement techniques, wading rod use and much more!
response.title: FlowTracker Handheld ADV: Instructional Training Video
